---
title: ""
author: ""
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-expand: true
    toc-depth: 4
    toc-location: left
    number-sections: true
    self-contained: true
    code-fold: true
    output-file: "ESM"
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
execute: 
  warning: false
  message: false
  echo: true
---

# Project Setup

```{r}
#| label:  setup

source('https://inkaverse.com/setup.r')
```

# Data import

```{r}
gs <- "https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/1JoyeRmb7oALd8wfzGgjBZc7anbFwYNbEMd3d9sCRUu4/edit?gid=1627057956#gid=1627057956" %>% 
  as_sheets_id()

fb <- gs %>% 
  range_read(ss = .,sheet = "fb")
```

#Cálculo de índices de germinación

```{r}
# Install packages and dependencies

library(GerminaR)
library(factoextra)
library(dplyr)

# Prosopis data set

fb %>% 
   head(10) %>% 
   kable(caption = "fb_dataset")
```

```{r}

# germination analysis (ten variables)

gsm <- ger_summary(factors = c("Nacl")
                   , SeedN = "Seed"
                   , evalName = "Gr_"
                   , cumulative =T
                   , data = fb
                   )

# Prosopis data set processed

gsm %>% 
  head(10) %>% 
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~round(., 2))) %>% 
  kable(caption = "Function ger_summary performe ten germination indices")
```

# Anova

$$y = media + Nacl + error$$

##Porcentaje de germinación

```{r}
# analysis of variance

av_grp <- aov(grp ~ Nacl, data = gsm)
Anova(av_grp)

# mean comparison test

mc_grp <- ger_testcomp(aov = av_grp
                       , comp = c("Nacl")
                       , type = "tukey"
                       )

# data result

mc_grp$table %>% 
  mutate(
    across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(., 2))
  ) %>% 
  kable(
    caption = "Comparison of germination percentage among scarification treatments using Tukey test"
  )
```

```{r}
library(GerminaR)
#Gráfico
grp <- mc_grp$table %>% 
   fplot(data = .
       , type = "bar"
       , x = "Nacl"
       , y = "grp"
       , group = NULL
       , ylimits = c(0, 120, 20)
       , ylab = " Germinación ('%')"
       , xlab = F
       , legend = "none"
       , sigsize = 4
       , error = "ste"
       , sig = "sig"
       , color = T
       )+ 
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 8),  # título eje X
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 9, face = "bold"),  # título eje Y
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12),   # números/categorías eje X
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10)    # números eje Y
  )

grp$layers[[1]]$aes_params$width <- 0.6

grp

 ggsave(plot =, "grp.jpg")
```

##Velocidad de germinación

```{r}
# analysis of variance

avgsp <- aov(gsp ~ Nacl, data = gsm)
Anova(avgsp)

# mean comparison test

mc_gsp <- ger_testcomp(aov = avgsp
                       , comp = c("Nacl")
                       , type = "tukey"
                       )

# data result

mc_gsp$table %>% 
  mutate(
    across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(., 2))
  ) %>% 
  kable(
    caption = "Comparación de la velocidad de germinación mediante tratamientos de escarificación usando la prubea de Tukey"
  )
```

```{r}
#Gráfico
gsp <- mc_gsp$table %>% 
   fplot(data = .
       , type = "bar"
       , x = "Nacl"
       , y = "gsp"
       , group = NULL
       , ylimits = c(0, 10, 2)
       , ylab = "Velocidad de germinación ('%')"
       , xlab = F
       , legend = "none"
       , sigsize = 4
       , error = "ste"
       , sig = "sig"
       , color = T
       )+ 
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 8),  # título eje X
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 9, face = "bold"),  # título eje Y
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12),   # números/categorías eje X
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10)    # números eje Y
  )

gsp$layers[[1]]$aes_params$width <- 0.6

gsp

 ggsave(plot =, "gsp.jpg")
```

##Tiempo medio de germinación

```{r}
## Mean Germination Time (MGT)

# analysis of variance

avmgt <- aov(mgt ~ Nacl, data = gsm)
anova(avmgt)

# mean comparison test

mc_mgt <- ger_testcomp(aov = avmgt
                       , comp = c("Nacl")
                       , type = "tukey")

# data result

mc_mgt$table %>% 
  mutate(
    across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(., 2))
  ) %>% 
  kable(
    caption = "Comparación del tiempo medio de germinación"
  )
```

```{r}
#Gráfico

# bar graphics for mean germination time

mgt <- mc_mgt$table %>% 
  fplot(data = .
       , type = "bar" 
       , x = "Nacl"
       , y = "mgt"
       , group = NULL
       , ylimits = c(0,20, 2)
       , ylab = "Tiempo medio de germinación (horas)"
       , xlab = F
       , sig = "sig"
       , error = "ste"
       , color = T
       , legend = "none"
       )+ 
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 8),  # título eje X
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 8.5, face = "bold"),  # título eje Y
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12),   # números/categorías eje X
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 8)    # números eje Y
  )

mgt$layers[[1]]$aes_params$width <- 0.6

mgt

 ggsave(plot =, "mgt.jpg")
```

##Sincronía de germinación

```{r}
# analysis of variance

avsyn <- aov(syn ~ Nacl, data = gsm)
anova(avsyn)

# mean comparison test

mc_syn <- ger_testcomp(aov = avsyn
                       , comp = c("Nacl")
                       , type = "tukey")

# data result

mc_syn$table %>% 
  mutate(
    across(where(is.numeric), ~ round(., 2))
  ) %>% 
  kable(
    caption = "Comparación de la sincronización"
  )


```

```{r}
#Gráfico

# bar graphics for mean germination time

syn <- mc_syn$table %>% 
   fplot(data = .
       , type = "bar" 
       , x = "Nacl"
       , y = "syn"
       , group = NULL
       , ylimits = c(0,1.2, 0.2)
       , ylab = "Índice de sincronía de germinación"
       , xlab = F
       , sig = "sig"
       , error = "ste"
       , color = T
       , legend = "none"
       ) + 
  theme(
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 8),  # título eje X
    axis.title.y = element_text(size = 8.5, face = "bold"),  # título eje Y
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12),   # números/categorías eje X
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 10)    # números eje Y
  )


syn$layers[[1]]$aes_params$width <- 0.6

syn


 ggsave(plot =, "syn.jpg")
```

#Unir imagenes

```{r}
library(cowplot)

# Extraer la leyenda de uno de los gráficos
leyenda <- get_legend(
  grp + 
    labs(fill = "Concentraciones de Nacl (gr)") +
    theme(legend.position = "top")
)

# Quitar leyendas de los gráficos individuales
grp2 <- grp + theme(legend.position = "none")
mgt2 <- mgt + theme(legend.position = "none")
gsp2 <- gsp + theme(legend.position = "none")
syn2 <- syn + theme(legend.position = "none")

# Unir gráficos
plot_varger <- plot_grid(
  plot_grid(grp2, mgt2, gsp2, syn2, ncol = 2, labels = "auto"),
  leyenda,
  ncol = 1,
  rel_heights = c(6, 0.9)
)

plot_varger

ggsave(
  plot = plot_varger,
  filename = "ver_ger.jpg",
  units = "cm",
  width = 30,
  height = 15
)
```

# PCA

![](images/PCA_1)
